description: Create a Project Template named 'New Branch Office Setup' with the type 'Infrastructure', priority 'High', and description 'Standard template for commissioning IT equipment in new branch locations.' Include a milestone titled 'Infrastructure Preparation' (Status: 'Open') and a task under that milestone titled 'Site Survey and Cabling Check' with the owner 'Administrator' and priority 'Medium'. Login credentials: Administrator / Administrator (or Admin1234!).
